text: Every representative’s license issued hereunder shall expire at midnight on the 30th day of June of each year.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 4. Manufacturers, Transporters, Dealers, and Salesmen [11700 - 11909]
#### Article 3. Representatives [11900 - 11909]
##### § 11904

Every representative’s license issued hereunder shall expire at midnight on the 30th day of June of each year.

*(Added by Stats. 1973, Ch. 996.)*

subsections.text: Every representative’s license issued hereunder shall expire at midnight on the 30th day of June of each year.
